FAQ
FAQ
FAQ

We've got the answers.

We've got the answers.

Didn't get the answer you were looking for?

Talk with Human
We will be happy to answer! It should take between 1 to 2 working days.
What services does your digital marketing agency offer?

We provide a comprehensive range of services, including Search Engine Optimization (SEO), Content Marketing, Social Media Marketing, Brand Strategy, Paid Advertising (PPC), and Web Design & Optimization.

Answered by
Fateema Tasnim
What services does your digital marketing agency offer?

We provide a comprehensive range of services, including Search Engine Optimization (SEO), Content Marketing, Social Media Marketing, Brand Strategy, Paid Advertising (PPC), and Web Design & Optimization.

Answered by
Fateema Tasnim
What services does your digital marketing agency offer?

We provide a comprehensive range of services, including Search Engine Optimization (SEO), Content Marketing, Social Media Marketing, Brand Strategy, Paid Advertising (PPC), and Web Design & Optimization.

Answered by
Fateema Tasnim
Do you offer ongoing marketing contracts or one-time projects?

We offer both ongoing marketing contracts and one-time project engagements, depending on your business needs and objectives.

Answered by
David Snow
Do you offer ongoing marketing contracts or one-time projects?

We offer both ongoing marketing contracts and one-time project engagements, depending on your business needs and objectives.

Answered by
David Snow
Do you offer ongoing marketing contracts or one-time projects?

We offer both ongoing marketing contracts and one-time project engagements, depending on your business needs and objectives.

Answered by
David Snow
How long does it take to see results from SEO efforts?

SEO is a long-term strategy. Typically, clients begin to see noticeable improvements within 3 to 6 months, but this can vary based on industry competitiveness and the current state of your website.

Answered by
David Snow
How long does it take to see results from SEO efforts?

SEO is a long-term strategy. Typically, clients begin to see noticeable improvements within 3 to 6 months, but this can vary based on industry competitiveness and the current state of your website.

Answered by
David Snow
How long does it take to see results from SEO efforts?

SEO is a long-term strategy. Typically, clients begin to see noticeable improvements within 3 to 6 months, but this can vary based on industry competitiveness and the current state of your website.

Answered by
David Snow
What is PPC advertising, and how can it benefit my business?

PPC, or Pay-Per-Click advertising, allows you to place ads on search engines and other platforms, paying only when someone clicks on your ad. It's an effective way to drive targeted traffic quickly and can be tailored to fit various budgets.

Answered by
David Snow
What is PPC advertising, and how can it benefit my business?

PPC, or Pay-Per-Click advertising, allows you to place ads on search engines and other platforms, paying only when someone clicks on your ad. It's an effective way to drive targeted traffic quickly and can be tailored to fit various budgets.

Answered by
David Snow
What is PPC advertising, and how can it benefit my business?

PPC, or Pay-Per-Click advertising, allows you to place ads on search engines and other platforms, paying only when someone clicks on your ad. It's an effective way to drive targeted traffic quickly and can be tailored to fit various budgets.

Answered by
David Snow
How will we communicate and collaborate during our partnership?

We maintain open lines of communication through regular meetings, emails, and reports. A dedicated account manager will be assigned to ensure seamless collaboration.​

Answered by
David Snow

We maintain open lines of communication through regular meetings, emails, and reports. A dedicated account manager will be assigned to ensure seamless collaboration.​

Answered by

How long does it take to see results from digital marketing?

It depends on your goals and the services you're using. SEO and content marketing typically take a few months to show strong results, while paid advertising and social media campaigns can generate quicker outcomes. At Marketra, we focus on building strategies that drive both immediate wins and long-term growth.

Answered by
David Snow

  • 01

    Marketra helped us cut through the noise. Their digital strategies didn’t just bring us visibility—they brought us the right kind of traffic. We saw a noticeable jump in leads within the first month.
    Jason Lee

    Founder, LeeTech Solutions

  • 02

    We partnered with Marketra to improve our online marketing efforts, and the results exceeded expectations. Their team was sharp, strategic, and always one step ahead. Our ROI has never looked better.
    Michael Torres

    Marketing Director, GreenHive Co.

  • 03

    We’re a small business with a big dream, and Marketra made sure that dream reached the right audience. From branding to social media, their team nailed it.
    Daniel Reed

    Owner, Brew & Bean Coffeehouse

  • 04

    As a brand focused on sustainability, we needed marketing that aligned with our values. Marketra not only respected our vision but elevated it. Their team crafted a message that truly connected with our audience.
    Ryan Adams

    Co-Founder, UrbanCart

  • 05

    We’ve worked with other agencies before, but Marketra brought a whole new level of energy and expertise. They understood our goals and helped us scale fast—without compromising brand integrity.
    Alex Morgan

    Head of Growth, Nova Fitness

  • 06

    From the first meeting, it was clear that Marketra knew their stuff. They built a tailored strategy that covered SEO, content, and paid ads—and everything worked in sync. The results? More visibility, more customers, and more growth.
    Jason Lee

    CEO, EcoNest Organics
